title: Apricot Lamb Soft Toys Plush White Polar Bear Stuffed Animal Soft Cuddly Perfect for Child (White Polar Bear)
features: Perfect Size: The lovable stuffed bear is a perfect size for kids' hugging and companion, and is very convenient to take away for camping and outgoing.
Premium Material: 100% handmade toy with premium soft and fluffy materials, always keep safety and healthy in mind, delicately stuffed animal with 100% fiber filling.

Easy to Clean: When the little fancy bear gets dirty, you can just brush it gently with little water, and then dry it in the sun. Soon, it will become beautiful again. For toy's sake, please do not wash it in the machine. If have to, please set the machine to run slowly and use warm water.

Suitable for Use from Birth: If you just need to prepare a gift for the new-born baby, the stuffed plush will be a good choice. It is not only a cute companion, but also has the power to cultivate kids' sensory awareness.

Special Gifts: Perfect for Birthday, Christmas Day, Children's Day, Thanks giving Day, Valentine's Day, etc.. This stuffed plush will be a big warm surprise for someone for keeping at home or taking out and about.
